---
title: Advent of Code 2021
---

## Solutions for 2021

[Day 1](2021-01.qmd)

1.  
2.  

-   
-   


[Day 2](2021-02.qmd)

1.  
2.  

-   
-   


[Day 3](2021-03.qmd)

1.  
2.  

-   
-   


[Day 4](2021-04.qmd)

1.  
2.  

-   
-   


[Day 5](2021-05.qmd)

1.  
2.  

-   
-   


[Day 6](2021-06.qmd)

1.  
2.  

-   
-   


[Day 7](2021-07.qmd)

1.  
2.  

-   
-   


[Day 8](2021-08.qmd)

1.  
2.  

-   
-   


[Day 9](2021-09.qmd)

1.  
2.  

-   
-   


[Day 10](2021-10.qmd)

1.  
2.  

-   
-   


[Day 11](2021-11.qmd)

1.  
2.  

-   
-   


[Day 12](2021-12.qmd)

1.  
2.  

-   
-   


[Day 13](2021-13.qmd)

1.  
2.  

-   
-   


[Day 14](2021-14.qmd)

1.  
2.  

-   
-   


[Day 15](2021-15.qmd)

1.  
2.  

-   
-   


[Day 16](2021-16.qmd)

1.  
2.  

-   
-   


[Day 17](2021-17.qmd)

1.  
2.  

-   
-   


[Day 18](2021-18.qmd)

1.  
2.  

-   
-   


[Day 19](2021-19.qmd)

1.  
2.  

-   
-   


[Day 20](2021-20.qmd)

1.  
2.  

-   
-   


[Day 21](2021-21.qmd)

1.  
2.  

-   
-   


[Day 22](2021-22.qmd)

1.  
2.  

-   
-   


[Day 23](2021-23.qmd)

1.  
2.  

-   
-   


[Day 24](2021-24.qmd)

1.  
2.  

-   
-   


[Day 25](2021-25.qmd)

1.  
2.  

-   
-
